name: Polpette (Meatballs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely mince the zest of 1 small lemon, 2 teaspoons parsley, and 2 garlic cloves.
2. Add the ground beef, salt, pepper, and nutmeg to the minced mixture.
3. Incorporate crumbled white bread that has been soaked in milk and squeezed dry.
4. Stir in the beaten egg.
5. Shape the mixture into small flattened cakes about 1/2 inch thick and 1 1/2 inches wide on a floured surface; avoid working or pressing the mixture too much.
6. Heat 1/4 cup olive oil in a pan and brown the cakes for about 2 minutes on each side.
7. Drain excess oil and serve immediately.
